text: AI-powered customer service platforms (Zendesk AI, Intercom Fin, Salesforce Einstein) deploy LLM-based conversational agents that handle 40-60% of first-contact inquiries without human intervention -- across channels (chat, email, voice) -- using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over help center articles and ticket history. Zendesk (2025) reported 30% reduction in average handle time and 25% improvement in CSAT when AI triages and drafts responses for human agents.

AI ticket routing and categorization: NLP models (fine-tuned BERT/RoBERTa) automatically classify incoming tickets by intent (refund, technical issue, account question), urgency (sentiment analysis), and required expertise. ML-based routing matches tickets to the optimal agent based on skill set, workload, and past resolution speed, reducing misrouting by 40-60% and first-response time by 20-30%.
